name: Reflex Plus Canned Cat Food Liver In Jelly 400g
description: Reflex Plus Canned Cat Food (Liver in Jelly),? fully-balanced, sliver containing cat food, carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. COMPOSITION:? Meat and Animal Derivatives (Liver 4% ), Minerals. NUTRIENT COMPOSITION ?NUTRITIVE ADDITIONS Crude Protein 9,5% ?Vitamin A ?? ?1400 IE/kg Crude Oils & Fats ??5,0% ?Vitamin D3 ?180 IE/kg Crude Cellulose ( Fiber ) ??0,5% ?Iron ?8,0 mg/kg Moisture ??80% ?Copper ? 1,2 mg/kg Crude Ash 3,0% Iodine ??0,21 mg/kg ?Manganese ??1,6 mg/kg ?Zinc ?8,0 mg/kg ?Selenium ??0,02 mg/kg FEEDING RECOMMENDATION:? For an adult cat of 4 kg in normal activity 1 can in 2 meals. The individual necessity depends on factors like age, breed or activity. Fresh drinking water should always be available.
